transcript: Breaking ball, looking for Mohamed, he's got it under his spell, has options in the middle, that's brilliant! Mohamed Bansari! A landmark moment for Qatar as they celebrate their first ever World Cup finals goal. And the Altumama Stadium love that from a man who's only just come on. That was absolutely brilliant. This place has absolutely eru erupted it's a great cross of ontario had a similar chance at the end of the game first group game against second on what a terrific header that was attacking it we thought that the game was just moving away from qatar but now so interested to see what happens now a bit between the teeth Qatar
